chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2049 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objections No. 1 to 7 2. For hearing of CMA No. 10059/2025 3. For hearing of main case 05.06.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Rind advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ali Safdar AAG I.O/SIP Muhammad Khan PS Khipro District Sanghar -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. I.O/SIP Muhammad Khan PS Khipro District Sanghar is present in Court and states that he has recorded the 161 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Farzana and on the basis of that statement, he undertakes to file his report under ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate within 03 days of the date of this order. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
